prompt: Use case: historical-scene. Asset type: 16:9 Remotion background plate. Image 1 is a style-only reference. Create the same warm layered hand-torn paper collage style with no people. A closer, calmer view of the same mountain creek bank: muted blue water and rounded paper rocks behind, soft blue-green mountains in atmospheric layers, bamboo framing the far left and pine branches framing the upper right. Leave a wide clear dry-ground stage across the center for two separate character cutouts and their grinding-stone prop group; keep the bottom subtitle-safe region uncluttered. The composition should support a gentle conversational close shot without changing locations. Visible paper fibers, matte texture, rice-paper clouds, indigo, tea green, ochre and ivory. No characters, no silhouettes, no grinding stone or iron pestle already present, no text, no letters, no watermark, no logo, no modern objects, no finished needle, no photorealism, no 3D.
